Add.ElementValue: 10008110=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY]A very experienced Pirate. Knows all Ships ..[CR] [CR]
10008111=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY]An Expert about Ship design ..[CR] [CR]
10008270=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY]Knows everything about Architecture Anno 1404 ..[CR] [CR]

10132542=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]Must be built on the Coast. [CR]Enables you to build Hanseatic ships. [CR] [CR]Gives a Bonus to all Trading ships.

10132543=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]Must be built on the Coast. [CR]Enables you to build Improved Warships. [CR] [CR]Gives a Bonus to all Warships.

10135500=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]Must be built at the Coast.[CR]Enables you to build Pirate ships.

10132541=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]Must be built on the Coast. [CR]Enables you to build venetian Boats and Ships.

Edit.ElementValue: 10130001=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]Must be built on the Coast.[CR]Enables you to build Large trading ships and Large warships.
Edit.NewValue: 10130001=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]Must be built on the Coast.[CR]Enables you to build Warships.

10157492=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]You once found this building plan inside a cave. [CR]This is written on the rotten parchemnt: [CR] [CR][COLOR 0xFFFFFF80]and when You finished this Ship, send your best crew onboard and sink it[CR][DEFAULTCOLOR] [CR]You wonder if this ship will be worth it ..

10157488=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]Not very useful for an Empire, but it looks good to Your Harbour.

10125043=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]Beautifies the Economy.

10125046=[TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_HEADER][AUTOSIZE_ICONGUID] [GUIDNAME][TTT TOOLTIP_TITLED_BODY][BUILDING_COSTS][CR] [CR]Many big and small, cute and fierce animals for home. [CR]Not to be processed!
